bolt.focus: Clearing UI performance validation debt for Phase 6 configurations
bolt.directive: Execute your pending task to monitor Plasma startup overhead. Quantify any boot time degradation caused by the new default LookAndFeel and global shortcut configurations specifically in profile/airootfs/etc/xdg/*.

palette.focus: Clearing UX, accessibility, and journal logging validation debt
palette.directive: Complete your pending tasks. Ensure journalctl output properly surfaces permission errors from the sandboxed services in profile/airootfs/etc/systemd/system/*.service. Validate the accessibility of Phase 6 Windows-familiar shortcut integrations in profile/airootfs/etc/xdg/*.

sentinel.focus: Clearing systemd strict sandboxing and desktop security debt
sentinel.directive: Aggressively audit the pending systemd sandboxing directives. Verify that services in profile/airootfs/etc/systemd/system/*.service have strictly minimal ReadWritePaths (e.g., /usr, /boot, /etc, /var) and no unnecessary capabilities. Additionally, audit the newly introduced desktop entries in profile/airootfs/etc/xdg/* for arbitrary command execution vulnerabilities.

note: All specialists must focus exclusively on resolving pending items in their respective ai/tasks/*.json manifests. Architect remains completely paused.
